verifyNote: General steps, not legal or tax advice. Order and specifics vary; confirm with an immigration attorney and a CPA.

checklists.title: Start earning on your H-4 EAD
checklists.blurb: The essentials before you take your first job or gig.

items.label: Confirm your EAD is valid and note the exact expiration date
Confirm your H-4 status / I-94 is valid (the EAD depends on it)
Get or confirm your Social Security Number (SSN)
Decide how you'll work: employee (W-2) vs self-employed (sole prop vs LLC)
Open a separate bank account for business/freelance income
Plan for self-employment tax & quarterly estimated taxes (1099 income)
Set up simple bookkeeping to track income and expenses
Calendar your EAD renewal (file early — no auto-extension for new filings)

checklists.title: Start a small business
checklists.blurb: From structure to permits to staying compliant.

items.label: Confirm your H-4 EAD is valid (required to actively work in the business)
Choose a structure: sole proprietorship or single-member LLC
Register the LLC with your state (if you chose an LLC)
Get an EIN from the IRS (free)
Get any state/local business licenses or permits
Check industry-specific rules (e.g. food: cottage-food/health permit; childcare: state licensing)
Open a business bank account; keep finances separate
Set up bookkeeping and a tax plan with a CPA
Consider liability insurance for your activity
